THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, TRACEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 310 COLUMBUS AVE, #124, SF, CA 94133 $1,450.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,450.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-21-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, SHOULD DEFT COMPLY WITH ALL OBLIGATIONS AND VACATES THE PREMISES OF ALL OCCUPANTS AND PERSONAL BELONGINGS AND TURNS OVER THE KEYS TO PLAINTIFF PRIOR TO EXPIRATION OF THE ACTUAL STAY OF EVICTION, DEFT MAY HAVE THE JUDGMENT DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
